html:
Exclusive to:

The Hippopotamoose Antler is a Hamlet exclusive Item dropped by the Hippopotamoose. It can be used to craft the Bird Whistle.

Hippopotamoose Antlers can also be traded to a Pig Hunter for five Oincs.

Usage

×3

×5

“This ought to be of some use.”
–Wilson
“Yeesh. It's pretty big.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang get mighty antler!”
–Wolfgang
“It's been severed from an animal head.”
–Wendy
“FLESHLING ACCESSORY”
–WX-78
“Belongs to a Hippoptamidae Capreolinae.”
–Wickerbottom
“Yep. That's a big one.”
–Woodie
“Well, it'd make a good hat rack.”
–Maxwell
“The skull extension of a semiaquatic antlered animal.”
–Wagstaff
“A symböl öf cönquest!”
–Wigfrid
“Whoa! Look at how big this is!!”
–Webber
“Woah. It's a big one!”
–Walani
“It's too bad I couldn't use this to roast wieners on.”
–Warly
“'tis tha riggin' o' tha'beastie.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS EARS O' THE BIG BEASTIE”
–Wilba
“Big Head Branch”
–Wormwood
“Maybe I could use it as a hatrack. Or a hat.”
–Wheeler
The Hippopotamoose Antler is a Hamlet exclusive Item dropped by the Hippopotamoose. It can be used to craft the Bird Whistle.
Hippopotamoose Antlers can also be traded to a Pig Hunter for five Oincs.

The '''Hippopotamoose Antler''' is a ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' exclusive [[Item]] dropped by the [[Hippopotamoose]]. It can be used to craft the [[Bird Whistle]].

Hippopotamoose Antlers can also be traded to a [[Pig Traders/Hunter|Pig Hunter]] for five [[Oinc|Oincs]].

== {{Pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
